name: Imaginary Friend: Tuantuan
description: A lovely ornament modeled after Qiqi's imaginary friend Tuantuan.\nTuantuan is a tiny finch every bit as adorable as Qiqi, and with time, it has only grown softer, rounder, and chubbier. Do imaginary friends enjoy grain as well? Or maybe, to Qiqi, Tuantuan was always supposed to grow a little more each day, just like other children do.\n"Real or imaginary, it's nice to grow up with friends by your side."
